message:
test(term/proptest): nest arb_tiered_scrollback_status tuples to avoid proptest 12-arity limit

proptest's Strategy impl is only provided for tuples up to 12 elements. The
arbitrary-generator for TieredScrollbackStatus in
frankenterm/term/tests/proptest_misc_serde.rs tried to produce a flat
17-tuple, which compiles on some proptest versions but fails the
`Strategy<Value = (...)>` trait lookup on the currently-pinned version and
yields obscure "the trait `Strategy` is not implemented for
`(bool, usize, usize, ..., u64)`" errors in the trait-error section.

Restructure into three nested tuples (6 + 6 + 5) so the outermost shape is a
3-tuple of Strategies, all well inside the 12-arity limit. The prop_map
closure destructures the nested shape back into the same 17 named bindings
that the struct constructor consumes, so the generated values are identical
to the old flat layout — this is purely a type-level refactor.

Field groupings (kept meaningful so future edits stay readable):
  group 1 (config + visible): tiering_enabled, configured_scrollback_rows,
      configured_hot_lines, configured_warm_max_bytes, visible_rows,
      in_memory_scrollback_rows
  group 2 (warm + cold spill totals): warm_resident_lines,
      warm_resident_bytes, warm_spill_lines_total, warm_spill_bytes_total,
      cold_spill_lines_total, cold_spill_bytes_total
  group 3 (cold-worker telemetry): cold_worker_peak_backlog_depth,
      cold_worker_completion_throughput_lines_per_sec,
      cold_worker_completed_lines_total,
      cold_worker_completed_batches_total, cold_worker_cancellation_count

No change to ranges or distributions (bool, 0..=100_000, 0..=10_000_000,
and full u64 domains for counter fields, exactly as before).

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -62,43 +62,55 @@ fn arb_semantic_zone() -> impl Strategy<Value = SemanticZone> {
 
 fn arb_tiered_scrollback_status() -> impl Strategy<Value = TieredScrollbackStatus> {
     (
-        any::<bool>(),
-        0usize..=100_000,
-        0usize..=100_000,
-        0usize..=10_000_000,
-        0usize..=100_000,
-        0usize..=100_000,
-        0usize..=100_000,
-        0usize..=10_000_000,
-        any::<u64>(),
-        any::<u64>(),
-        any::<u64>(),
-        any::<u64>(),
-        0usize..=100_000,
-        any::<u64>(),
-        any::<u64>(),
-        any::<u64>(),
-        any::<u64>(),
+        (
+            any::<bool>(),
+            0usize..=100_000,
+            0usize..=100_000,
+            0usize..=10_000_000,
+            0usize..=100_000,
+            0usize..=100_000,
+        ),
+        (
+            0usize..=100_000,
+            0usize..=10_000_000,
+            any::<u64>(),
+            any::<u64>(),
+            any::<u64>(),
+            any::<u64>(),
+        ),
+        (
+            0usize..=100_000,
+            any::<u64>(),
+            any::<u64>(),
+            any::<u64>(),
+            any::<u64>(),
+        ),
     )
         .prop_map(
             |(
-                tiering_enabled,
-                configured_scrollback_rows,
-                configured_hot_lines,
-                configured_warm_max_bytes,
-                visible_rows,
-                in_memory_scrollback_rows,
-                warm_resident_lines,
-                warm_resident_bytes,
-                warm_spill_lines_total,
-                warm_spill_bytes_total,
-                cold_spill_lines_total,
-                cold_spill_bytes_total,
-                cold_worker_peak_backlog_depth,
-                cold_worker_completion_throughput_lines_per_sec,
-                cold_worker_completed_lines_total,
-                cold_worker_completed_batches_total,
-                cold_worker_cancellation_count,
+                (
+                    tiering_enabled,
+                    configured_scrollback_rows,
+                    configured_hot_lines,
+                    configured_warm_max_bytes,
+                    visible_rows,
+                    in_memory_scrollback_rows,
+                ),
+                (
+                    warm_resident_lines,
+                    warm_resident_bytes,
+                    warm_spill_lines_total,
+                    warm_spill_bytes_total,
+                    cold_spill_lines_total,
+                    cold_spill_bytes_total,
+                ),
+                (
+                    cold_worker_peak_backlog_depth,
+                    cold_worker_completion_throughput_lines_per_sec,
+                    cold_worker_completed_lines_total,
+                    cold_worker_completed_batches_total,
+                    cold_worker_cancellation_count,
+                ),
             )| TieredScrollbackStatus {
                 tiering_enabled,
                 configured_scrollback_rows,
